headline: A Look At Match Group (MTCH) Valuation As COO Role Is Cut And User Trends Weaken
summary: Match Group (MTCH) is back in focus after the company decided to eliminate its Chief Operating Officer role, prompting longtime executive Hesam Hosseini to depart, just as pressure builds around user trends and competitive product updates. See our latest analysis for Match Group. At a share price of US$30.79, Match Group has seen short term share price weakness with a 90 day share price return of 7.23% and a 5 year total shareholder return decline of 79.24%.
